name: ENB Financial Corp
summary: ENB Financial Corp is a bank holding company headquartered in Ephrata, Lancaster County, Pennsylvania. Through its wholly owned subsidiary Ephrata National Bank (ENB), it provides commercial banking services including demand accounts, savings and time deposits, secured and unsecured commercial, real estate, and consumer loans. Additional services include trust and investment advisory through ENB Wealth Solutions, insurance through ENB Insurance, electronic funds transfer, ATMs, debit/credit cards, internet banking, mobile banking, and remote deposit capture to individuals and small-to-medium-sized businesses.

products.name: Commercial Loans
products.description: Secured and unsecured commercial loans offered to businesses in the market area.

products.name: Real Estate Loans
products.description: Secured real estate loans for personal and commercial clients.

products.description: Full range of deposit account products for individuals and businesses.

products.description: Online banking platform including bill pay, wire transfers, and remote deposit capture.
